message:
The other day, a storm warning popped up on my phone, and I could feel that familiar flutter of anxiety. But instead of worrying, I decided to embrace it. I gathered up some blankets, made a pot of hot cocoa, and invited the kids to build a pillow fort in the living room. We cozied up, played board games, and watched the rain dance against the windows. It turned into a memorable family night, with laughter and stories shared over the sound of the storm outside. 

While we were snuggled up, I took a moment to check my emergency kit and ensure everything was stocked, just in case. It was a gentle reminder that preparedness doesn’t have to be stressful; it can also be a cozy event! 

How do you turn stormy moments into something special at home?
